title: Tasty Canadian Ground Beef Hash
description: A citrusy and crumbly Canadian dish featuring ground poppy seeds, perfect for a hangover cure, this keto-friendly recipe is a delicious breakfast option. It combines the flavors of ground beef, poppy seeds, and citrus to create a unique taste experience.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the cooking oil and swirl it around to coat the bottom of the skillet.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the ground poppy seeds, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
